
# specification

## action
{'default': [], 'description': 'List of moves to make. Each move is [from_planet_id, direction_angle, num_ships]', 'type': 'array'}

## agents
[2, 4]

#configuration
{'actTimeout': {'default': 1, 'description': 'Maximum runtime (seconds) to obtain an action from an agent.',
'minimum': 0, 'type': 'number'}, 
'agentTimeout': {'default': 2, 'description': 'Obsolete field kept for backwards compatibility, please use observation.remainingOverageTime.', 'minimum': 0, 'type': 'number'},
'cometSpeed': {'default': 4.0, 'description': 'Speed of comets in units per turn along their orbital path.', 'type': 'number'},
'episodeSteps': {'default': 500, 'description': 'Maximum number of steps in the episode.', 'minimum': 1, 'type': 'integer'},
'runTimeout': {'default': 1200, 'description': 'Maximum runtime (seconds) of an episode (not necessarily DONE).', 'minimum': 0, 'type': 'number'},
'shipSpeed': {'default': 6.0, 'description': 'Maximum fleet speed per turn. Speed scales with fleet size: 1 ship moves at 1/turn, larger fleets approach this max.', 'type': 'number'}}

## info
{}

## observation
{'angular_velocity': {'default': 0, 'description': 'Rotation speed of planets in radians per turn.', 'type': 'number'}, 
'comet_planet_ids': {'default': [], 'description': 'Planet IDs that are comets (temporary extra-solar objects).', 'type': 'array'},
'comets': {'default': [], 'description': 'Active comet groups with planet_ids, paths, and path_index.', 'type': 'array'}, 
'fleets': {'default': [], 'description': 'List of active fleets: [id, owner, x, y, angle, from_planet_id, ships]', 'type': 'array'}, 
'initial_planets': {'default': [], 'description': 'Initial planet positions at game start: [id, owner, x, y, radius, ships, production]', 'type': 'array'}, 
'next_fleet_id': {'default': 0, 'description': 'Next available fleet ID.', 'type': 'integer'}, 'planets': {'default': [], 'description': 'List of planets: [id, owner, x, y, radius, ships, production]', 'type': 'array'}, 
'player': {'default': 0, 'description': 'Player ID (0, 1, 2, or 3)', 'type': 'integer'}, 
'remainingOverageTime': {'default': 2, 'description': 'Total remaining banked time (seconds) that can be used in excess of per-step actTimeouts -- agent is disqualified with TIMEOUT status when this drops below 0.', 'minimum': 0, 'shared': False, 'type': 'number'}, 
'step': {'default': 0, 'description': 'Current step within the episode.', 'minimum': 0, 'shared': True, 'type': 'integer'}}

## reward
{'default': 0, 'description': 'Score at the end of the game.', 'type': ['number', 'null']}

## Steps

Example:
```
data['steps'][0]
[{'action': [], 'info': {}, 'observation': {'angular_velocity': 0, 'comet_planet_ids': [], 'comets': [], 'fleets': [], 'initial_planets': [], 'next_fleet_id': 0, 'planets': [], 'player': 0, 'remainingOverageTime': 2, 'step': 0}, 'reward': 0, 'status': 'ACTIVE'}, {'action': [], 'info': {}, 'observation': {'angular_velocity': 0, 'comet_planet_ids': [], 'comets': [], 'fleets': [], 'initial_planets': [], 'next_fleet_id': 0, 'planets': [], 'player': 0, 'remainingOverageTime': 2}, 'reward': 0, 'status': 'ACTIVE'}]
```
